sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 47

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 47:1
items.html: (to the question) The two Vavs that turn upon the hinge have in them a withholding and closing force, since the illumination of the Yesod of AB is in them, in the secret of "Saul hiding among the vessels." See Answer 28. (p. 788, Item 83)
